data.title: TextMagic group's Q4 2025 revenue down 2% YoY to €3,525 thousand; affected by forex rates; would've been €3,786 thousand (+5%) with 2024 rates.
data.description: The unaudited consolidated revenue of the group dropped by 2% year-on-year in the fourth quarter of 2025 to €3,525 thousand, compared to €3,598 thousand in Q4 2024. The revenue of the Textmagic platform was impacted by fluctuations in foreign currency exchange rates. Had the exchange rates remained constant with those of 2024, the revenue in Q4 2025 would have been €3,786 thousand, reflecting a 5% increase.

data.title: Kuros Biosciences to update investors on U.S. IDN approvals, MDR certification, and MagnetOs adoption at upcoming conferences.
data.description: Kuros will showcase its approved US Integrated Delivery Network (IDN) approvals, Medical Device Regulation (MDR) certification, and recent data supporting the increased adoption of MagnetOs at the upcoming Octavian and Baader Bank conferences. These presentations will highlight Kuros' successful entry into the US market with its IDN approvals, meeting the stringent MDR requirements, and the positive reception and utilization of MagnetOs within the medical community. These developments signify Kuros' commitment to expansion and innovation in the healthcare sector.

data.title: FSS in India is the first payments company across India, ME, APAC, and South Africa to achieve ISO/IEC 42001 Certification.
data.description: In Mumbai, India on January 13, 2026, Financial Software and Systems (FSS), a prominent player in payments technology and transaction processing, secured a significant milestone by becoming the initial payments firm in India, the Middle East, Asia-Pacific (APAC), and South Africa to obtain ISO/IEC 42001 Certification. This accolade underscores FSS's commitment to excellence in its services.

data.title: Teneo invests in leading consulting firm Clarity Partners, adds 30+ professionals, opens Copenhagen office.
data.description: Teneo's Management Consulting division has grown significantly, welcoming over 30 new professionals to their team. This expansion marks the firm's entry into the Nordic region, evidenced by the opening of a new office in Copenhagen. The announcement was made on January 13, 2026, underlining Teneo's commitment to global CEO advisory services.

data.title: Sen. Cynthia Lummis introduces bill to protect crypto developers from money transmitter rules with Sen. Ron Wyden. They propose the Blockchain Regulatory Certainty Act to shield non-controlling developers and infrastructure providers. This aims to exempt developers who lack transaction control authority and support self-custody solutions. Story on Benzinga.com.
data.description: Two senators, Cynthia Lummis and Ron Wyden, have introduced a bipartisan bill to protect blockchain developers from being classified as money transmitters under federal law. Named the "Blockchain Regulatory Certainty Act," the bill aims to exempt non-controlling software developers and infrastructure providers from federal money transfer requirements. Non-controlling developers are those who work on blockchain-based ledgers but do not have the authority to control transactions without third-party approval. The bill also defines offering hardware or software for customer self-custody solutions and supporting infrastructure to maintain distributed ledger services as protected activities. This move is aimed at preventing software developers from facing regulatory burdens akin to banks.

data.title: CHC Navigation releases APACHE 4 PRO, a versatile USV for hydrographic surveys. A reliable platform for mapping & monitoring.
data.description: CHC Navigation (CHCNAV) has recently unveiled the APACHE 4 PRO, an innovative Unmanned Surface Vessel (USV) tailored for various hydrographic and bathymetric survey tasks. Launched in Shanghai on Jan. 13, 2026, this cutting-edge vessel boasts a durable hull design, compatibility with a range of instruments, and advanced navigation features. The APACHE 4 PRO serves as a dependable solution for conducting thorough underwater mapping and environmental tracking. This launch marks a significant milestone for CHCNAV as they continue to lead in providing geospatial solutions globally.

data.title: OCI Global and Proceed Group retire legacy SAP systems, using Proceed Cella Cloud. Successful program for long-term data retention.
data.description: OCI Global and Proceed Group have recently completed a successful system decommissioning program in London on January 13, 2026. Through the use of Proceed Cella Cloud, OCI was able to effectively retain and access critical legacy SAP data. This achievement is significant as it ensures the long-term retention of important data for the company. The program's success highlights the importance of utilizing innovative solutions like Proceed Cella Cloud, as it helps companies like OCI Global maintain access to vital information even following system changes.

data.title: Bitwise criticizes the 'ridiculous' 401(k) Bitcoin ban as Warren pushes SEC; Trump allows cryptos in retirement plans.
data.description: In August of last year, the US President at the time, Donald Trump, issued an executive order allowing for the potential inclusion of cryptocurrencies in 401(k) retirement plans. This move opened up new investment possibilities for individuals holding these retirement accounts.
